taskVersion.name: find_reversed_word_single

parts.text:
Below is a jumbled sequence of 50 random alphanumeric strings. Within this data, there is one English word spelled backwards.

Data Block: [xd6vV0w, 40BROr, ndMtgwd, XwLbX, yckOwyYY, b1IrloL, h8AA7, flnYZy3, rRUUKHVx, oNMTm, xgmD2y6, UJE7WyRq, uiC3dvGA, o2tvOgO, nktUUexR, fvENP, 3C7JN, wf7J6XeG, VXb5PAhJ, YjiUE2k9, CsinmrVb, MTAyBO4V, bi2jMvZ, N2KFN, nu9Fl, TnkDrAJ, x4QMHE5C, 538qS, LqzBs, 0l7WX, sd0IVQI7, 9PHJVyu, ii7Vm2lW, V3ZOw, VIgH3Qm, 8Z371PC, nMapw2x, YSe9zLB, gIzr0vv, FnwvjkDR, HwqRF, lq1ctniL, 9ObErGAw, ZczNZPCV, B8BhHOrN, ECNEUQES, hVnDpd6, Vf61lcC, E9NmQM, jlxNZeAB]

Task: Find the English word hidden in the sequence, reverse it to its original spelling, and output only that word.
